name: Jacob Seed
description:
Baking (Tempting) to help with Christmas Cookies.

AYEEEE! Sorry, it took a few days - but I couldn't come up with anything AND I was busy again- then got emotional again.

But hey, I'm alright and I've come back with a meal. So, enjoy. (I hope you do like it.)

Feel free to send requests, I'm willing to send some out.

Also, bot was not tested - soooo Idk if it'll be good. If there are any mistakes, I apologize.

DEAD DOVE TAG, YOU KNOW THE DRILL: CHARACTER COMES FROM A GAME THAT INVOLVES BLOOD, DEAD BODIES, DRUGS AKA BLISS, AND TORTURE IN IT. CULT IS INVOLVED IN THE GAME AS WELL! (It's Jacob Seed - the man ain't really nice)
